
## Generic cleaning {#genericclean}

Generic cleaning occurred within a different project (`envCleaned`) and was focused on project agnostic cleaning steps [@RN4606]. The cleaning steps are outlined briefly below.

```{r genericCleanText, results = "asis"}

envClean::knit_clean(clean_summary = clean_summary |> dplyr::filter(! grepl(basename(here::here()), path)))

```
